productDisplayName: Forever New Women Long Black Jacket
description: CompositionBlack pea-coat in a pleated design with an outer shell made of 53% wool, 31% polyester, 6% nylon, 5% acrylic and 5% viscose, and lining made of 100% polyester in metallic grey, with double breasted design that is buttoned up with metal grey uttons, buttoned flaps on the waist and shoulders, buttoned cuffs, insert pockets on the sides  and coat neck that can be converted to mock neck with the help of buttons on the side if the collarFittingRegularWash care Dry clean only Cool iron on reverse if necessary Take feminine dressing to the next level with this black pea coat from forever new. The simple pea coat gets a fresh look with the fitted waist design accentuated with the buttoned flaps and the pleats emerging from the waistline. The big, round metal buttons give it a festive feel. Team this with dresses and boots or with jeans, turtle necks and ankle boots for a classic look that never goes out of style.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in coatsHeight-5.8", Chest-33"
